name: wrong_room
description: **The Wrong Room** is a browser-based, AI-powered interactive dungeon game. It leverages MediaPipe for real-time object detection (using your webcam to find items like apples, cell phones, and wristwatches) and integrates with the Gemini Live API for real-time, dynamic narrative streaming to act as your Dungeon Master.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
